column1: This spreadsheet contains all operational/transactional data for FWG.
• Submissions - All estimator submissions and inquiries
• Quotes - Quote records with status tracking
• QuoteLineItems - Individual line items for quotes
• Invoices - Invoice records with payment status
• InvoiceLineItems - Individual line items for invoices
• Messages - SMS and email correspondence log
Submissions: New, In Progress, Quoted, Won, Lost, Archived
Quotes: Draft, Sent, Viewed, Approved, Declined, Expired, Converted
Invoices: Draft, Sent, Partial, Paid, Void
Tasks: Open, In Progress, Completed, Cancelled
